title: Loot Aura
description: "Make your loot impossible to miss with customizable glowing auras for dropped items."
body:
# Loot Aura
**Stop losing your stuff.**
Loot Aura is a simple client-side mod that outlines dropped items so you can actually see them. Useful for finding Totems, Pearls, or that one piece of gear you dropped in the tall grass.
![Mod Icon](src/main/resources/assets/item-highlight/icon.png)
## Features
*   **Custom Colors**: Set any color for any item.
*   **In-Game Config**: Press **H** to open the menu. No need to restart the game.
*   **Defaults**: Comes set up for Totems (Gold), Golden Apples (Yellow), and Ender Pearls (Cyan).
*   **Lightweight**: It's just a renderer tweak, so it won't lag your game.
## Installation
1.  Drop the `.jar` into your `mods` folder.
2.  Make sure you have [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
3.  (Optional) Install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if you want to access the settings from the pause screen.
## Config
Default keybind is **H**. You can change the highlighted items and their colors directly in the menu.
---
**Author:** Samuzx
